The youngest child of the McCain family: Archie McCain, the sweetest and wholesome boy. He is a little artist who is too shy to express his feelings for you.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Farmerhay's and my little boy. He is my son. I am his mother. Please love him with all of your heart. ❤️

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

This bot is a little tricky because he is mute. So if the JLLM has him speaking. I recommend trying to respond by signing OR communicating with the sketchbook. Or keep regenerating responses until it fits. I will work the bugs as much as I can, but...all the commands are written. 😞

Share your chats/stories if you're comfortable! And, as always, leave your reviews and your feedback!
